message:
✨ Add local cluster filter to TopPods and SecurityIssues cards

Add card-level cluster filtering that works on top of global filters:
- Filter dropdown appears when multiple clusters are available
- Shows count badge (e.g., "2/5") when filter is active
- Respects global cluster selection as upper bound
- Click-outside closes dropdown

This allows users to narrow down results within cards without changing
the global dashboard filter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
